summaries.title: A2A Protocol sendMessage must check localAgentId, not agent registry
summaries.summary: In A2A protocol implementations, `sendMessage()` must check `message.target === this._localAgentId` to route messages locally only for the local agent, not `this._agents.has(message.target)` which incorrectly routes remote agent messages locally. Additionally, avoid duplicate event emissions in `delegateTask()` since `_handleTask()` already emits `task:completed`, and always use explicit semicolons after destructuring assignments like `({ X } = require(...))` to prevent JavaScript ASI from misinterpreting the code.
